actions: Upgrade or downgrade Kubernetes to a matrix-supported version.
Re-run compatibility grading after control-plane version change.
Use a supported distribution or open an adapter request for this distribution.
Run preflight discovery and attach compatibility evidence to the request.
Select values for storage, object storage, identity, secret, ingress network, and GitOps controller profiles.
Use profile catalog defaults when environment-specific values are not required.
Install or configure all missing prerequisites for selected profiles.
Re-run preflight and ensure missing prerequisite list is empty.
Install Gateway API CRDs before selecting gateway-api based routing.
Verify GatewayClass and route resources reconcile successfully.
Install a supported ingress controller profile.
Confirm ingress class and TLS configuration are valid.
Adjust security context constraints for platform components.
Run policy checks and namespace deployment smoke tests.
Run synthetic write-read throughput test for selected storage class.
Document observed throughput against platform baseline.
Validate snapshot plugin compatibility with the object storage gateway.
Execute backup and restore drill before production rollout.
Validate identity group mapping for dashboard and index access.
Run role-mapping tests for at least one team and one operator role.
Use static users only for quickstart or temporary environments.
Plan migration to OIDC or SAML before production cutover.
Define and approve manual secret rotation procedures.
Document recovery steps for key rollover.
Validate `X-Forwarded-*` header behavior for ingress proxy chain.
Run authentication callback tests behind the ingress profile.
Implement Flux equivalent reconciliation controls for app sets.
Prove rollback behavior parity with the reference Argo CD flow.
